_note: Curated by hand from candidates.json (108 candidates across 9 sources) + Instagram signals. Times: ICPL and Coralville are local and trusted; library (WhoFi), Solon, and Facebook times are UTC in the raw data and were converted or hedged. Known follow-up: normalize all source times to America/Chicago.
weather_summary: Hot start, around 90 and humid, with afternoon storms likely Thursday and Friday. Cooler and calmer by the weekend. A splash-pad-and-shade week early, with the radar worth a look before any outdoor plan.
editor_note: Deep summer, and the libraries are carrying the week. Storytimes have moved into the parks, there's a Toy Story matinee, and North Liberty's Blues and BBQ anchors Saturday. Lead free and outdoors.

deep_dive.idea: Stories in the Park is the summer sleeper
deep_dive.why: ICPL runs its storytime outdoors at a rotating park most mornings this time of year. Free, early enough to beat the heat, and it turns a 20-minute storytime into a whole morning at a new playground. Most parents only know the indoor version.

events.title: Play Daze at Calder Park
events.hook: Free drop-in play at the park, run by the library. Bring water and let them loose.

events.title: Wee Read for babies and toddlers
events.hook: The under-2 crowd's morning out. Songs, board books, other tired parents.

events.title: Party in the Park at Calder Park
events.hook: Free evening activities in the park. A good way to wear everyone out before bed.

events.title: Stories in the Park at Mercer Park
events.hook: Storytime outdoors, early enough to beat the heat. Stay for the playground.

events.title: Friday Flick: Toy Story
events.hook: Toy Story on the big screen, indoors and air-conditioned. A solid rainy-afternoon backup.

events.title: North Liberty Blues and BBQ
events.hook: Live music, barbecue, and room to run. The weekend's anchor. Confirm the start time before you go.

events.title: Guided Hike through F.W. Kent Park
events.hook: A led hike at Kent Park with the library. Good for kids who like a naturalist along.

events.title: Latin American Music and Storytelling
events.hook: Music and stories together, all ages welcome. Free and indoors.

events.title: Art Play Sundays
events.hook: Open, messy art with no cleanup on you. A good Sunday if the weather turns.

events.title: Sunday Fun Day: Popsicle Craft
events.hook: A simple afternoon craft at the library. In and out, no supplies to buy.

events.title: Toby's Mesozoic Adventures (dinosaurs)
events.hook: A dinosaur show for the CCA side of the county. Confirm time and cost before you drive over.

events.title: Game On Club: D&D Meetup
events.hook: A kid-level Dungeons and Dragons meetup. For the ones who are into it, they're really into it.

events.title: Make Your Own Slime
events.hook: Slime, made at the library, cleaned up by the library. Confirm the time.

events.title: How-To Tuesday: Sew a Stuffie
events.hook: Kids sew a small stuffed animal to take home. A real skill and a keepsake.

events.title: Kids Switch Party: Mario Kart and Just Dance
events.hook: Mario Kart and Just Dance on the big screen at the library. Confirm the time.

events.title: Music on the Move (park concert)
events.hook: Free live music in a park, early evening. Pack a blanket and dinner. Confirm which park this week.

events.title: Wildcard Wednesday: Toad Abode
events.hook: Build a little backyard toad house. Odd, hands-on, and the kind of thing kids remember.

cut.title: ELL classes, Spanish/Buddhist/Braver Angels groups, DSA and Veterans For Peace meetings, city council, 55+ Connections, karaoke, adult comedy
cut.reason: adult or civic, not family this-week items

cut.title: Member Hour (ICM), repeated library help-hours
cut.reason: recurring filler; ICM drop-in noted in Bulletin

cut.title: Forest Bathing with Kayaks, Modern Calligraphy, Financial Wellness
